Motion To Vacate
Off Calendar Nov-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF LESLIE RODRIGUEZ'S MOTION TO VACATE

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Pro per plaintiff's unintelligible "motion to vacate" is denied without prejudice. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2020 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, or objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on DEFENDANTs BETH HAUSCARRIAGUE, JULIE CATALANO and ARIF's GAMAL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, as follows:

Defendants Julie Catalano, Arif Gamal and Beth Hauscarriague's demurrer to plaintiff's complaint is sustained without leave to amend; no opposition filed.

The moving party shall prepare and submit to the court a proposed order that repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
